text:
is a fictional creature from the ' game. It was featured for the first time in the Bonds of Phantasmal Blue collaboration event in 2025.

Profile

Nepsis under Elpis's influence that have awakened as weapons, devouring their brethren to evolve into this new form. With jet-black bodies and mutated heads, their height is equivalent to that of an Evangelion. MAGI has detected the same wave patterns as Angels from them, though Harpax are not Angels themselves. According to legends passed down on Hitakami Island, Harpax bring disaster and pass judgment on all who dare to touch the Astral relic. They are frenzied and highly destructive creatures whose sole purpose is to carry out the annihilation of skydwellers.

History

Bonds of Phantasmal Blue

Trivia

Misato and Ritsuko decide to categorize the fusioned Black Nepsis as the Harpax in order to facilitate communication. Granblue Fantasy - EVANGELION collaboration - Chapter 4: Behind the Truth
